info.description: Press logos shown in the 'As seen in' strip on the homepage. Add one entry per publication or retailer (Harrods, Selfridges, The Telegraph, etc.).

logo.description: Logo image. SVG preferred (scales cleanly), PNG with transparent background also works. Best size around 200x80 (landscape) for consistency.

url.description: Optional link — e.g. URL to the article or retailer page. Leave blank for a non-clickable logo.

is_homepage_featured.description: Show in the 'As seen in' strip on the homepage.

is_active.description: Untick to HIDE this entry from the public site without deleting it. Useful for seasonal items or things you're drafting privately.
